scripts.test:cognitum: npx tsx -e "import './cognitum.test'; import { printSummary } from './test-runner'; setTimeout(printSummary, 100);"

scripts.test:neural: npx tsx -e "import './neural.test'; import { printSummary } from './test-runner'; setTimeout(printSummary, 100);"
scripts.test:benchmark: npx tsx -e "import './benchmark.test'; import { printSummary } from './test-runner'; setTimeout(printSummary, 100);"
